name: 折叠刀（★） | 表面淬火
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A little color never hurt anyone
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 通过木炭在高温下的应用，这把武器已被彩色表面淬火。 一点彩色痕迹无伤大雅
